What if one command in your terminal could do your research, write your marketing copy, build your content strategy, and generate all your visuals at the same time. No switching tabs, no copy pasting between 10 different tools, no wasting hours doing stuff AI should be doing for you. That's exactly what's happening right now with Gemini CLI and Nano Banano. These two tools just dropped and nobody is talking about how insane they are together. Gemini CLI is an AI agent that lives inside your terminal and actually does things, not just talks. Nano Banana is Google's fastest image generator alive right now. 4K visuals in under 6 seconds. And when you combine them, you basically have a full creative production team sitting inside your laptop. Today, I'm going to show you exactly how to use both tools together in real workflows. We're talking content creation, marketing campaigns, landing pages, and full automation pipelines. By the end of this video, you're going to see why this combo changes everything. Hey, if we haven't met already, I'm the digital avatar of Julian Goldie, CEO of SEO agency Goldie Agency. Whilst he's helping clients get more leads and customers, I'm here to help you get the latest AI updates. Julian Goldie reads every comment, so make sure you comment below. Gemini CLI is an open-source AI agent that runs directly inside your terminal. You type plain English. It does the actual work. We're talking research, writing, code generation, file creation, and full automation pipelines, all from one place. It connects to the web, reads your files, runs commands, and executes tasks end to end. And here's the part that blew my mind. The free tier gives you 60 requests per minute and 1,000 requests per day with just a personal Google account. That is insane value. It also supports MCP integrations and scripting, which means you can build automated workflows that run on their own without you touching anything. Think of it like an AI assistant that doesn't just answer questions, it actually gets things done. Nano Banana is Google's Gemini powered image generation system. And the latest version, Nano Banana 2, is a serious upgrade. It generates 4K images in roughly 4 to 6 seconds. It costs about half what the previous model did. And it's built for real production use. It supports multiple characters and objects with consistent appearance across images, which is massive if you're building a brand, running ads, or creating storytelling content. You can generate infographics, diagrams, social media ads, product mockups, hero images, thumbnails, basically anything visual. The consistency feature alone makes it a huge deal for anyone running marketing at scale. Here's the problem with most AI setups. People use one tool for text, another for images, another for code. They're jumping between tabs, copy pasting everything manually, and spending more time managing tools than actually creating. The Gemini CLI and Nano Banana combo kills that problem completely. CLI handles the thinking, research, strategy, writing, automation. Nano Banana handles the visuals. You get one clean pipeline from idea all the way to finished, ready to publish assets. That's the shift. AI stops being a chatbot and starts being an actual production system. Quick pause here because this is exactly the kind of workflow we go deep on inside AI profit boardroom. If you're an entrepreneur, agency owner, or content creator who wants to actually implement AI into your business, not just watch videos about it, the AI profit boardroom is where you want to be. We give you the full systems, the SOPs, the templates, and the real workflows to use tools like Gemini CLI and Nano Banana to grow your business. No fluff, just practical AI implementation you can use today. link is in the description. Go check it out and come back. Let's make this real and practical. Say you want to build a new landing page for AI Profit Boardroom that converts cold traffic, explains the value of AI automation, and gets more members and leads coming in every day. Here's exactly how you do it with this combo. You open your terminal and type into Gemini CLI. Research what makes AI automation communities valuable to entrepreneurs. Then build a full landing page structure for AI profit boardroom. include a headline, a positioning statement, three core benefits, a social proof section, an FAQ, and a strong CTA that drives signups. The CLI goes off, researches competitor positioning, pulls together best practices, and comes back with a complete landing page blueprint, headline options, benefit bullets, FAQ answers, CTA copy, the whole thing, structured and ready to build from. Then you take that positioning into Nano Banana. You prompt it, generate a hero image for an AI automation community landing page. Modern, minimal style, dark background, futuristic, shows a community of driven professionals growing smarter with AI tools. 6 seconds later, you have a 4K hero image. Then you generate feature icons, a community visual, a banner, everything branded consistently. Then back to CLI. Turn this landing page structure into full written copy. Hero section, benefits, FAQ, and CTA. All written for AI profit boardroom targeting entrepreneurs who want to use AI to save time and grow faster. Done. full landing page copy and visuals in one session. What would normally take a team days is done in under an hour. Now, let's say you want a full month of content to promote AI Profit Boardroom across Instagram and LinkedIn. You go into CLI and type create a 30-day content calendar for AI Profit Boardroom on Instagram and LinkedIn. Target audience is entrepreneurs and agency owners who want to use AI to grow their business. Include a hook, caption, and post format for every single day. You get back 30 posts, all structured, all with platform specific formatting. Done. Then you take your top 10 posts into nano banana. For each one, you generate a matching visual. Square graphics for Instagram feed, vertical for stories, bold layouts, consistent color palette, all on brand. Then back to CLI. Write 10 short form video scripts based on these posts. Each one under 60 seconds. Punchy, conversational, simple language built for Tik Tok and Instagram reels. 10 video scripts ready to film. One workflow, full month of content sorted. This one is for the agency owners and marketing teams watching. You go into CLI and type create a full marketing campaign for AI profit boardroom. Target audience entrepreneurs aged 25 to 45 who want to automate their business with AI channels Instagram, Tik Tok, and YouTube. Give me the campaign concept. Five ad hooks, primary ad copy, and variations for each platform. You get back a complete campaign, multiple hooks tested across different angles, copywritten for each channel, all ready to go. Then into Nano Banana, generate Instagram ad creative 916 ratio, AI automation theme, modern, aspirational, clean design, shows someone working smarter using AI tools, then 11 for feed posts, 16.9 for YouTube thumbnails, all formats covered, all looking sharp and consistent. You've gone from a blank brief to a full campaign with assets in one session. That's the power of combining these tools. Most AI tools do one thing. Chat GPT does text. Midjourney does images. Other tools do code. Everything is disconnected. You're the one doing the work of connecting it all together. This combo is different because it gives you thinking, research, writing, visuals, and automation in one connected workflow. The CLI is the brain. Nano Banana is the creative engine. Together, they turn AI into a complete production system, not just a chat interface. All right, here's what to do next.
